mapper.insert: /* GuestReferrerLog.insertReferrerLog */ INSERT INTO TB_GUEST_REFERRER_LOG ( GUEST_TOKEN_ID, UTM_SOURCE, UTM_MEDIUM, UTM_CAMPAIGN, UTM_CONTENT, REFERER_URL, LANDING_URL, VISITED_AT ) VALUES ( #{guestTokenId}, #{utmSource}, #{utmMedium}, #{utmCampaign}, #{utmContent}, #{refererUrl}, #{landingUrl}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* GuestReferrerLog.selectLogsByGuestTokenId */ SELECT ID AS id, GUEST_TOKEN_ID AS guestTokenId, UTM_SOURCE AS utmSource, UTM_MEDIUM AS utmMedium, UTM_CAMPAIGN AS utmCampaign, UTM_CONTENT AS utmContent, REFERER_URL AS refererUrl, LANDING_URL AS landingUrl, VISITED_AT AS visitedAt FROM TB_GUEST_REFERRER_LOG WHERE GUEST_TOKEN_ID = #{guestTokenId} ORDER BY VISITED_AT DESC
